subject: Floatzel, an otter-like aquatic Pokemon with an orange body and cream flotation sac, leaping through ocean waves
description: A sleek, weasel-like aquatic Pokemon with a warm orange body and a cream-colored life-preserver-style flotation sac wrapped around its torso leaps joyfully through a sunlit ocean scene. It grins with an open mouth and its streamlined body curves mid-leap above churning white foam and blue-green waves. The setting is open water in bright daylight, with the surf energetically splashing around the creature. The overall impression is one of speed, freedom, and playful confidence.
foreground: Floatzel mid-leap above ocean surf, cream flotation sac prominent, open grin, streamlined body
background: Blue-green ocean waves with white foam and surf
emotion: joyful, exuberant — open-mouthed grin, dynamic leap posture
